agentAbility.name: Echo Proxy
agentAbility.description: Deploy a proxy of your tank with identical parameters and modules, and switch between the two to throw enemies off scent.

agentTrait.name: Signature Masking
agentTrait.description: Exceeding an Energy threshold recodes the vehicle's electronic signature, hiding it from enemy HUDs until you fire.

tankAbilities.name: EMP Trap
tankAbilities.description: Place an EMP mine that detonates on contact with an enemy, damaging and slowing them before emitting pulses that further damage and slow enemies in range.

tankAbilities.name: Active Camo
tankAbilities.description: Enter a near invisible state, evading enemy spotting and targeting until you fire or use EMP Trap. Movement or proximity to enemies reduced your concealment.
